personal.preferred_title: Data Warehouse Engineer | SQL, Redshift, ETL/ELT & Data Modeling

summary: Senior Data Engineer and Data Warehouse Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience designing ETL/ELT pipelines, warehouse schemas, reporting datasets, validation routines, and cloud data platform patterns. Strong hands-on background in SQL, Python, Pandas, PySpark, AWS Redshift, S3, Glue, Oracle, data modeling, dimensional reporting structures, data quality, and production troubleshooting. Experienced translating raw operational data into clean, governed, analytics-ready datasets for BI, forecasting, dashboards, and decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Designed historical schemas, reporting datasets, and warehouse structures in Oracle and Redshift to support capacity analysis, retention, seasonal forecasting, and executive reporting.
Built AWS-oriented data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue for ETL, Athena-style lake access, and Redshift for analytics and ML forecasting workloads.
Developed SQL transformations, validation routines, reconciliation checks, and troubleshooting workflows to improve accuracy, completeness, and reliability of production datasets.
Optimized query patterns, storage structures, and data preparation workflows for recurring analytics, reporting, and forecasting use cases.
Created dashboards and reporting workflows using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, and enterprise telemetry datasets to surface utilization risks and operational insights.
Supported governance and compliance expectations in a regulated banking environment through documentation, access awareness, data retention logic, and production support discipline.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating hospitality systems.
Built analytics and reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and performance analysis.
Collaborated with technical teams during production monitoring upgrades and maintained reporting continuity through a Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 cutover.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly export processes.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and operational reports adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Worked with stakeholders and application teams to define monitoring requirements, validate production behavior, and document technical procedures.
Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap memory issues, CPU usage, and garbage collection impact.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing and troubleshooting.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting large transaction volumes.
Built validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to ensure integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized database access and transaction processing, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.
Supervised QA cycles and production bug triage using Mercury Test Director, supporting test case execution and defect resolution.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Warehousing: Data Warehouse Design, Redshift, Oracle, Dimensional Modeling, Star Schema, Snowflake Schema, Fact and Dimension Tables, SCD Concepts, Data Architecture
skills.ETL/ELT: ETL/ELT Pipelines, Data Ingestion, Data Transformation, Data Cleansing, Data Validation, Reconciliation, Data Quality Rules, Production Troubleshooting
skills.Programming & Querying: Advanced SQL, Python, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java
skills.Cloud Data Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Data Lake Patterns, Serverless Data Platform Design
skills.Governance & Quality: Data Governance, Data Definitions, Documentation, Data Lineage Concepts, Access Control Awareness, Compliance-Aware Delivery, Regulated Banking Environments
skills.Orchestration & DevOps: Apache Airflow, Docker, Git, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Linux/Unix, Monitoring, Alerting, Technical Documentation
skills.BI & Reporting: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Power BI Concepts, Tableau/Looker Concepts, Executive Reporting, KPI Reporting, Dashboard Data Preparation
skills.Modern Stack / Learning: Snowflake, Databricks, Delta Lake, dbt, Terraform fundamentals, BigQuery concepts, Fivetran/Prefect concepts
skills.Observability: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, CA APM / Introscope, Dynatrace AppMon, AppDynamics, Synthetic Monitoring, Transaction Tracing, Performance Reporting

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, Parquet/Snappy storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting and AI-enabled consumption.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting engine using Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to reduce manual forecasting cycles by 90% and predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered scoring, resume tailoring, cover generation, quality gates, and application tracking using FAISS, sentence-transformers, and Grok API.
